name: Roasted Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb. green beans, washed and stemmed
1 red onion, cut in half and sliced into semi-circles
Roasted red bell peppers (roast your own, or use jarred), sliced into strips
Salt and pepper, or other seasonings (I used a bit of garlic powder, thyme, and sage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread green beans and onions in a Pammed baking dish.
2. Place in a 400 degree oven and roast for approximately 20 minutes, or until beans are as tender as desired. Shake the pan a few times while roasting, and add a few teaspoons of water or stock if they appear to be getting too dry.
3. When ready, empty into a bowl. Add roasted peppers and a few splashes of balsamic vinegar. Stir well.
4. Season to taste, and chill (can also be served warm).
